title: Where it began
introduction: Every great love story has a first small moment—the one that looks ordinary until it changes everything.

title: The little moments
introduction: It wasn't one grand gesture. It was laughter, long conversations, familiar glances, and the feeling that home could be a person.

title: I choose you
introduction: Love became a decision we kept making—on the easy days, the difficult days, and every quiet day in between.

title: And then there were three
kicker: Our love grew a new name
introduction: Rayden made our world bigger, louder, funnier, and more beautiful than we knew it could be.

title: The life we built
kicker: New places, the same hand to hold
introduction: Across every move and every unfamiliar street, we carried the most important thing with us: each other.

title: Still to come
introduction: Thirty-five is not an ending. It is another beautiful beginning, with more places to see and more ordinary days to treasure.
